channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Magic: The Gathering Cards From Unreleased Hatsune Miku Secret Lair Deck Have Leaked
item.content:encoded:
Screenshots of a potential Hatsune Miku Secret Lair Deck for Magic: The Gathering have been leaked online. Due to a potential shipping error, certain players may have gotten a glimpse of an entire deck themed around the popular Vocaloid idol adapted to the popular card game.

The first Hatsune Miku Secret Lair Deck leak happened via a Reddit post three weeks ago on r/SecretLairMTG. According to the post, the user had ordered the Secret Lair Commander Deck Goblin Storm. But the featured Commander on the sealed deck was shown to be Miku, Song of the People (Trostani, Selesnya's Voice).

Other contents in the deck were unknown as the deck remained unopened and was put on eBay. According to a report by Wargamer, the deck sold for over $2,700, due in no small part to a combination of the novelty and allure of the deck and the potential of getting a hold of something before an official release.

Aside from the featured commander card, it was unclear if this Hatsune Miku Secret Lair Deck leak was legitimate. Elaborate fan-edited cards are possible after all. Alternatively, Magic cards have leaked ahead of release in the past, like when the Lorwyn Eclipsed Prerelease event unexpectedly contained cards from the then-upcoming Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles crossover set.

However, a second Reddit post on r/magicTCG seems to corroborate this initial leak. The second post contains several screenshots of other Magic: The Gathering cards now sporting Hatsune Miku characters. In addition to the already shown Commander card are screenshots of the following cards:

  • Finale of Destruction
  • Tigereye Cameo as "Backstage Cameo"
  • Bountiful Promenade
  • Archangel of Thune as "Archangel of Tunes"
  • Grand Crescendo
  • Soul Warden
  • Break Down
  • Song of the Worldsoul
  • Cultivate
  • Vorinclex, Voice of Hunger as "Miku, The Complete Performer"
  • Halo Fountain as "Cascade of Song"
  • Shalai, Voice of Plenty as "Miku, Voice Over All"

With these additional cards, there's a clearer picture now of what the Hatsune Miku Secret Lair deck is supposed to be. It is a White/Green Commander deck with a music/song theme. Given Miku's Jpop Idol trappings, this all fits. There's also a high chance the deck will rapidly sell out due to it having several highly sought after cards such as Finale of Destruction.

As for how Wizards of the Coast will handle these leaks or address the deck when it officially goes up for sale is anyone's guess.

Ever since he was small, Tyler Chancey has had a deep, abiding love for video games and a tendency to think and overanalyze everything he enjoyed. This… More about Tyler



https://techraptor.net/tabletop/news/magic-gathering-cards-from-unreleased-hatsune-miku-secret-lair-deck-have-leaked
